SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Record Class BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
Record Components:
recipeBook - the knowledge book ItemStack. Must not be null and must have KnowledgeBookMeta.
Enclosing class:
BookBuilder
public static record BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack recipeBook) extends Record
A builder class for creating and modifying knowledge books in Minecraft.

The builder allows the addition, retrieval, and setting of recipes in a knowledge book ItemStack. The input ItemStack is cloned to maintain immutability.

  • Constructor Details

    • RecipeBookBuilder

      public RecipeBookBuilder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack recipeBook)
      Constructs a new RecipeBookBuilder from the specified knowledge book ItemStack.

      The provided ItemStack must be a valid knowledge book with KnowledgeBookMeta. The original item is cloned to maintain immutability.

      Parameters:
      recipeBook - the knowledge book ItemStack. Must not be null and must have KnowledgeBookMeta.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if recipeBook is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if recipeBook is Material.AIR.
      IllegalStateException - if recipeBook does not have KnowledgeBookMeta.

  • Method Details

    • addRecipe

      public BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder addRecipe(org.bukkit.NamespacedKey... recipes)
      Adds one or more recipes to the knowledge book.
      Parameters:
      recipes - the recipes to add, represented by NamespacedKey instances.
      Returns:
      the current RecipeBookBuilder instance.

    • build

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack build()
      Builds and returns a new ItemStack based on the current state of this RecipeBookBuilder.
      Returns:
      a new cloned ItemStack representing the knowledge book.

    • getRecipes

      public List<org.bukkit.NamespacedKey> getRecipes()
      Retrieves the list of recipes currently stored in the knowledge book.
      Returns:
      a list of NamespacedKey representing the stored recipes.

    • hasRecipes

      public boolean hasRecipes()
      Checks whether the knowledge book contains any recipes.
      Returns:
      true if the knowledge book contains recipes, otherwise false.

    • setRecipes

      public BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder setRecipes(List<org.bukkit.NamespacedKey> recipes)
      Sets the list of recipes for the knowledge book, replacing any existing recipes.
      Parameters:
      recipes - the list of NamespacedKey representing the new recipes.
      Returns:
      the current RecipeBookBuilder instance.

    • toItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder toItemBuilder()
      Converts the current RecipeBookBuilder to an ItemBuilder for further manipulation.
      Returns:
      a new ItemBuilder initialized with the current knowledge book.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • recipeBook

      @NotNull public @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack recipeBook()
      Returns the value of the recipeBook record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the recipeBook record component
